---
title: "Treatment-resistant cancer pathways"
---

# Treatment-resistant cancer pathways

Earlier biomedical research that built wet lab experience in molecular pathways, treatment resistance, Western blotting, DNA extraction, and bacterial culture.

## Project angle

This work contributed to research on molecular mechanisms of treatment resistance in head and neck cancer and provided foundational wet lab and experimental biology experience.

## Methods and outputs

- Western blotting
- DNA extraction
- Bacterial culture
- Molecular biology workflows
- Treatment response and resistance pathways

## Publications / outputs

- AXL mediates cetuximab and radiation resistance through tyrosine 821 and the c-ABL kinase pathway in head and neck cancer. McDaniel et al. Clinical Cancer Research, 2020.
